name: hyperbot
description: Scaffold and configure Hyperliquid-native automated trading workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Build Hyperliquid trading workspaces from strategy and market inputs.
interface.longDescription: Hyperbot scaffolds a Hyperliquid-native trading workspace, installs selected strategies, prepares automation, and validates the path from a funded account to unattended execution.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Hyperliquid trading workspace for TAOUSDT.
Install swing and scalp strategies into a fresh workspace.
Prepare a test-account automation flow for Hyperliquid.
